---
title: 'Sewing Things'
date: '2012-06-11T16:22:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '771951330675212423'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/sewing-things.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Sewing Things'
---

<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">Home</a><br />
<h2 style="text-align: center;">
 Sewing Things</h2>
<br />
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td><a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/2012/06/sewing-kits.html" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1284-a13211c770d5.jpg" width="320" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: small; text-align: -webkit-auto;">Sewing Kits</span></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!<br />
<br />
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a><br />
<br />
Flavia Wolfe<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a><br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
